name: jetrix
description: Jetrix sync for Techjays Delivery OS. Binds a local workspace to a Jetrix project and keeps them in sync through a working-copy model: Jetrix is the single source of truth; the local .jetrix/cache is a disposable read-through copy. jetrix:pull refreshes the cache incrementally, all analysis happens locally, and jetrix:push publishes structured records back (idempotent upsert by stable id, transactional propose→commit, pull-before-push conflict safety). Owns .jetrix/project.json (identity + app/env→branch wiring). Builds on the delivery-os document contract. Provides /jetrix:init, /jetrix:pull, and /jetrix:push.
